text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The calendar changes, and Sweep Tosho moves
into her senior year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And also...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho and I make our first shrine visit of
the year.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hey, Familiar! Tie my fortune to the top!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Yup! ♪ Hehe. This is gonna be the best year ever!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Come to think of it, Rob Roy was chosen as
Umamusume of the Year last year, huh?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
But it'd be boring if she wasn't. The more
recognition she gets, the better it'll be when I
beat her at the Takarazuka Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Okay! I'm gonna have the best year ever!
choice_data_list: Yeah! And I'll be here to support you!
Yeah! And I'll be here to support you!
And I'll become the best familiar ever!
I am at your disposal, my queen.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Okay! I'm gonna have the best year ever!
choice_data_list: Yeah! And I'll be here to support you!
Yeah! And I'll be here to support you!
And I'll become the best familiar ever!
I am at your disposal, my queen.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Haha! ♪ Then, hurry up and get to it!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Carry me! Give me a piggyback ride and rush us
back to campus!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I'm not taking another step starting now! That's
familiar work from now on! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, I let her climb onto my back.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe. ♪ C'mon, go faster! Faster!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Yeah, there you go! Now go even faster!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: H-hey, Familiar! Stay steady! Walk straight!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho gives me an occasional nudge with
her dangling legs.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Drop me and you're gonna get it! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah? So you mean you aren't the best
familiar right now?
choice_data_list: There are some areas I can work on...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. And here I thought you were supposed to
be a high-class familiar. Sloppy.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Do you need some... encouragement?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hyah! Hya! The heck do you think you're doing,
Familiar?! No slacking off, you!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Uh, is Sweep chasing her trainer around with a
broom?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Wh-what's going on?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In a total reversal from the typical trainer and
trainee dynamic, Sweep Tosho keeps me running
until I'm thoroughly exhausted.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hehehe! ♪ I could get used to this.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Okay, Familiar. Kneel down over there!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Yes. Aren't I your master and queen?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Don't tell me you're not going to listen to my
commands?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I genuflect on the spot. Sweep Tosho smiles and
takes out a wand.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She places it on my right shoulder, then on my
left.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: My familiar, I dub thee knight for a day.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Just for today, okay?! You'll just be a regular old
familiar again tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho is in a much better mood than usual.
At her instruction, we return to the academy.
